title: Wins World 01
description: Mobs and NPCs of the Fantasy
body:
# Welcome to Wins World 01

## Wins World 01:
is the first fantasy world created by god Wins with lore, fantasy mobs, and NPC characters. The mod added many friendly friends to the world but also many foes.
## Guide:
### NPC:
Lore characters, unique in the world, some only spawn in specific places. Each character will have their own special skills.
- **Minmond**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Minmond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dd0d16be65889d11cec8fbddc28d58ea9af0528.png)
  Minmond is a spirited and eager young adventurer, always ready to leap into action. With boundless energy, he fearlessly charges at any monster in sight. When the battle gets tough and his health drops low, Minmond will retreat and then come back after he heals himself with potions.
</details>

- **Yumimari**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Yumimari](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c21bd4d735914f10709cd44a1e6d452db8388bf1_0.webp)
  Yumimari is a timid adventurer who would rather avoid conflict and run from monsters. But things change when she has a teammate by her side, she will also try to heal herself by drinking a health potion. Can be tamed and wear armor by right-clicking if isn't be tamed by any other NPCs.
</details>

- **Orumi**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Orumi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ca11283012f1fb8f797927d78657328519c0a7_0.webp)
  Orumi is a low-class demon soldier serving under demon general Anemiju’s command. Despite his lengthy service, he remains unranked, fueling his disdain and arrogance. His pride keeps him at odds with his peers as he struggles to prove his worth within the troop. He has 2 phases, after defeating his 1st phase, he will equip himself with his beloved spear.
</details>

### Mobs:
- **Frogzard:** Frog + lizard? A creature from the game Adventure Quest, Adventure Quest World.

1.**Forest Frogzard**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Forest Frogzard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62b07c71ab8b91a40c034d37ad92369951eef22d_0.webp)
  Forest Frogzard will hunt animals and attack everything if they get too close. Male forest Frogzards are bigger, while females are smaller. You can only tame the baby one that you hatched from the egg obtained from the female Frogzard with RAW mutton, beef, or Porkchop. After that, they can be ridden when equipped with a saddle.
</details>

- **Glihitampos:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Glihitampos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e182a651cbd5eedc55e6e50f6c4d77a313e54ef1_0.webp)
  Glihitampos is a herbivore and will fight back attackers. They have 2 genders and 2 variants, the male will be bigger than the female.
</details>

- **Dragon:**

1.**Dust Fang**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Dust Fang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/818e10548c17217d17a966e0ef8a910e25fb829f_0.webp)
  Dust Fang is a drake dragon type, they will hunt everything when they are hungry otherwise, they are neutral mob. Can be tamed after defeated with RAW mutton, chicken, beef, pork chop, rabbit, glihitampos meat, especially frogzard egg with higher tame rate. Can be ridden when equipped with a Dust Fang saddle.
</details>

- **Dark Beast:** Dark beasts are the animals that are enraged and strengthened by the dark aura of the demon. The demon causing this must be a master of dark magic and want to bring chaos to the overworld.

1.**Dark Pig**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Dark Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fe8159c69ec8272e22705d7031d64f461f55889.png)
</details>
   
2.**Dark Chicken**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Dark Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b95509d53831e6d96c65ee68f4ecd3705e2922.png)
Bros became dinosaurs
</details>
   
3.**Dark Sheep**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Dark Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9aba34fa549bcde8e8f9e4d2ba7cb5a2f152c12.png)
</details>

4.**Dark Cow**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
![Dark Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b2d70845d52db85a513dd8306ed240b960f8b0a.png)
Minotaur?
</details>
